import os
import socket
import shutil
import subprocess
import tempfile
import time
import unittest
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path


REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
COMPOSE_FILE = REPO_ROOT / "docker" / "docker-compose.dev.yml"


def wait_for_http(url: str, timeout: int = 300) -> None:
    deadline = time.time() + timeout
    last_error = None
    while time.time() < deadline:
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=5) as response:
                if response.status < 500:
                    return
        except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - exercised in integration flow
            last_error = exc
            time.sleep(2)
    raise AssertionError(f"{url} did not become ready before timeout. Last error: {last_error}")


def port_is_in_use(port: int) -> bool:
    with socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM) as sock:
        sock.settimeout(1)
        return sock.connect_ex(("127.0.0.1", port)) == 0


class DevComposeIntegrationTest(unittest.TestCase):
    maxDiff = None

    def setUp(self) -> None:
        if shutil.which("docker") is None:
            self.fail("docker is required for this test")

        self.temp_dir = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()
        self.env_file = Path(self.temp_dir.name) / ".env"
        self.project_name = f"doccano-dev-compose-{os.getpid()}"
        self.env_file.write_text(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    "ADMIN_USERNAME=admin",
                    "ADMIN_PASSWORD=password",
                    "ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@example.com",
                    "RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER=doccano",
                    "RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS=doccano",
                    "POSTGRES_USER=doccano",
                    "POSTGRES_PASSWORD=doccano",
                    "POSTGRES_DB=doccano",
                    "FLOWER_BASIC_AUTH=",
                ]
            )
            + "\n",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )

    def tearDown(self) -> None:
        try:
            self.run_compose("down", "--volumes", "--remove-orphans", check=False)
        finally:
            self.temp_dir.cleanup()

    def run_compose(self, *args: str, check: bool = True) -> subprocess.CompletedProcess[str]:
        command = [
            "docker",
            "compose",
            "--project-name",
            self.project_name,
            "--env-file",
            str(self.env_file),
            "-f",
            str(COMPOSE_FILE),
            *args,
        ]
        return subprocess.run(
            command,
            cwd=REPO_ROOT,
            text=True,
            capture_output=True,
            check=check,
        )

    def test_dev_stack_starts_and_serves_expected_ports(self) -> None:
        self.assertTrue(COMPOSE_FILE.exists(), f"Missing compose file: {COMPOSE_FILE}")
        for port in (3000, 8000, 8001):
            self.assertFalse(port_is_in_use(port), f"Port {port} is already in use on localhost")

        config = self.run_compose("config")
        self.assertIn("backend:", config.stdout)
        self.assertIn("frontend:", config.stdout)
        self.assertIn("ml:", config.stdout)

        try:
            up = self.run_compose("up", "--build", "-d")
        except subprocess.CalledProcessError as exc:  # pragma: no cover - exercised in integration flow
            self.fail(f"docker compose up failed\nSTDOUT:\n{exc.stdout}\nSTDERR:\n{exc.stderr}")

        self.assertEqual(up.returncode, 0)

        wait_for_http("http://127.0.0.1:3000")
        wait_for_http("http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/health/")
        wait_for_http("http://127.0.0.1:8001/healthz")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    unittest.main()

services:
  backend:
    build:
      context: ..
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.prod
    image: doccano-dev-backend
    working_dir: /backend
    command:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - |
          python manage.py wait_for_db &&
          python manage.py migrate &&
          python manage.py create_roles &&
          (
            python manage.py create_admin
            --username "$ADMIN_USERNAME"
            --password "$ADMIN_PASSWORD"
            --email "$ADMIN_EMAIL"
            --noinput || true
          ) &&
          python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
    volumes:
      - ../backend:/backend
      - media:/backend/media
      - tmp_file:/backend/filepond-temp-uploads
    environment:
      ADMIN_USERNAME: "${ADMIN_USERNAME}"
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: "${ADMIN_PASSWORD}"
      ADMIN_EMAIL: "${ADMIN_EMAIL}"
      CELERY_BROKER_URL: "amqp://${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}:${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}@rabbitmq"
      DATABASE_URL: "postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?sslmode=disable"
      DEBUG: "True"
      DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: "config.settings.development"
      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - rabbitmq
    ports:
      - 8000:8000
    networks:
      - network-backend
      - network-frontend

  celery:
    image: doccano-dev-backend
    working_dir: /backend
    command:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - |
          python manage.py wait_for_db &&
          celery --app=config worker --loglevel=INFO --concurrency="${CELERY_WORKERS:-1}"
    volumes:
      - ../backend:/backend
      - media:/backend/media
      - tmp_file:/backend/filepond-temp-uploads
    environment:
      CELERY_BROKER_URL: "amqp://${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}:${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}@rabbitmq"
      DATABASE_URL: "postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?sslmode=disable"
      DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: "config.settings.development"
      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
    depends_on:
      - backend
      - postgres
      - rabbitmq
    networks:
      - network-backend

  frontend:
    image: node:18.20-bullseye-slim
    working_dir: /frontend
    command:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - |
          yarn install --network-timeout 1000000 &&
          yarn dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
    environment:
      API_URL: "http://backend:8000"
      CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING: "true"
      GOOGLE_TRACKING_ID: ""
      NODE_OPTIONS: "--openssl-legacy-provider"
      WATCHPACK_POLLING: "true"
    volumes:
      - ../frontend:/frontend
      - frontend_node_modules:/frontend/node_modules
    depends_on:
      - backend
    ports:
      - 3000:3000
    networks:
      - network-frontend

  ml:
    build:
      context: ../fastapi_service
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    working_dir: /app
    volumes:
      - ../fastapi_service:/app
    ports:
      - 8001:8001
    networks:
      - network-backend
      - network-frontend

  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3.10.7-alpine
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: "${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}"
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: "${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}"
    networks:
      - network-backend

  postgres:
    image: postgres:13.3-alpine
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data/
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: "${POSTGRES_USER}"
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}"
      POSTGRES_DB: "${POSTGRES_DB}"
    networks:
      - network-backend

volumes:
  frontend_node_modules:
  media:
  postgres_data:
  tmp_file:

networks:
  network-backend:
  network-frontend:

version: "3.7"
services:

  backend:
    image: doccano/doccano:backend
    volumes:
      - static_volume:/backend/staticfiles
      - media:/backend/media
      - tmp_file:/backend/filepond-temp-uploads
    environment:
      ADMIN_USERNAME: "${ADMIN_USERNAME}"
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: "${ADMIN_PASSWORD}"
      ADMIN_EMAIL: ${ADMIN_EMAIL}
      CELERY_BROKER_URL: "amqp://${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}:${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}@rabbitmq"
      DATABASE_URL: "postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?sslmode=disable"
      ALLOW_SIGNUP: "False"
      DEBUG: "False"
      DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: "config.settings.production"
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    networks:
      - network-backend
      - network-frontend

  celery:
    image: doccano/doccano:backend
    volumes:
      - media:/backend/media
      - tmp_file:/backend/filepond-temp-uploads
    entrypoint: ["/opt/bin/prod-celery.sh"]
    environment:
      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
      CELERY_BROKER_URL: "amqp://${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}:${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}@rabbitmq"
      DATABASE_URL: "postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?sslmode=disable"
      DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: "config.settings.production"
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - rabbitmq
    networks:
      - network-backend

  flower:
    image: doccano/doccano:backend
    entrypoint: ["/opt/bin/prod-flower.sh"]
    environment:
      PYTHONUNBUFFERED: "1"
      CELERY_BROKER_URL: "amqp://${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}:${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}@rabbitmq"
      DATABASE_URL: "postgres://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB}?sslmode=disable"
      DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE: "config.settings.production"
      FLOWER_BASIC_AUTH: "${FLOWER_BASIC_AUTH}" # Format "username:password"
    depends_on:
      - celery
    ports:
      - 5555:5555
    networks:
      - network-backend
      - network-frontend

  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3.10.7-alpine
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: "${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER}"
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: "${RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS}"
    ports:
      - 5672:5672
    networks:
      - network-backend

  nginx:
    image: doccano/doccano:frontend
    command: >
      /bin/sh -c
      "envsubst '
      $${WORKER_PROCESSES}
      '< /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template
      > /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      && nginx -g 'daemon off;'"
    environment:
      API_URL: "http://backend:8000"
      GOOGLE_TRACKING_ID: ""
      WORKER_PROCESSES: "auto"
    volumes:
      - static_volume:/static
      - media:/media
    ports:
      - 80:8080
    depends_on:
      - backend
    networks:
      - network-frontend

  postgres:
    image: postgres:13.3-alpine
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data/
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: "${POSTGRES_USER}"
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: "${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}"
      POSTGRES_DB: "${POSTGRES_DB}"
    networks:
      - network-backend

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  static_volume:
  media:
  tmp_file:

networks:
  network-backend:
  network-frontend:

FROM python:3.10.19-slim-trixie

WORKDIR /app

ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir fastapi==0.116.1 "uvicorn[standard]==0.35.0"

COPY app /app/app

EXPOSE 8001

CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8001", "--reload"]

ARG PYTHON_VERSION="3.10.19-slim-trixie"
FROM python:${PYTHON_VERSION} AS backend-builder

# hadolint ignore=DL3008
RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libpq-dev=17.* \
    unixodbc-dev=2.* \
    g++=4:* \
    libssl-dev=3.* \
    curl=8.* \
 && apt-get clean \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /tmp
COPY backend/pyproject.toml backend/poetry.lock /tmp/
SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-o", "pipefail", "-c"]

RUN pip install -U --no-cache-dir pip==25.3 \
 && curl -sSL https://install.python-poetry.org | POETRY_VERSION=1.5.1 python - \
 && export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH" \
 && poetry export --without-hashes -o /requirements.txt \
 && echo "psycopg2-binary==2.8.6" >> /requirements.txt \
 && pip install --no-cache-dir -r /requirements.txt

FROM python:${PYTHON_VERSION} AS runtime

WORKDIR /backend

RUN apt-get update \
 && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    libpq-dev=17.* \
    unixodbc-dev=2.* \
    libssl-dev=3.* \
 && apt-get clean \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN groupadd -g 61000 doccano \
  && useradd -g 61000 -l -M -s /bin/false -u 61000 doccano

COPY --from=backend-builder /usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages /usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages
COPY --from=backend-builder /usr/local/bin/celery /usr/local/bin/celery
COPY --from=backend-builder /usr/local/bin/gunicorn /usr/local/bin/gunicorn
COPY --chown=doccano:doccano tools/ /opt/bin/
COPY --chown=doccano:doccano backend/ /backend/
RUN mkdir -p /backend/staticfiles \
  && mkdir -p /backend/client/dist/static \
  && mkdir -p /backend/media \
  && mkdir -p /backend/filepond-temp-uploads \
  && chown -R doccano:doccano /backend/

ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE 1
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED 1
USER doccano:doccano
VOLUME /backend/staticfiles

ENTRYPOINT [ "/opt/bin/prod-django.sh" ]

I’m running the backend and frontend suites in disposable containers now so the verdict doesn’t depend on missing host-side tooling.
